mapper.update: UPDATE after_sale_order SET order_id = #{orderId}, order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, product_id = #{productId}, sku_id = #{skuId}, product_name = #{productName}, product_image = #{productImage}, quantity = #{quantity}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, after_sale_type = #{afterSaleType}, after_sale_status = #{afterSaleStatus}, apply_reason = #{applyReason}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, apply_time = #{applyTime}, process_time = #{processTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM after_sale_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY apply_time DESC
SELECT * FROM after_sale_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY apply_time DESC
SELECT * FROM after_sale_order ORDER BY apply_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE after_sale_order SET after_sale_status = #{status}, process_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM after_sale_order WHERE after_sale_status = #{status}
